reasoning: This sequence will depict a robot gently cradling an unseen honey pot, emphasizing care and sweetness.  The movement will be slow and deliberate. We'll use a three-frame sequence to highlight the key moments: the initial approach, the gentle hold, and a slight pull back.  The robot's arms will move in a coordinated manner. Frame 1 will show the arms extending forward, mimicking the act of reaching for the honey pot. Frame 2 will show the arms cupping around the imaginary pot, suggesting a gentle embrace. The wrists will be angled slightly to enhance the cradling motion.
